summary: Trading bot dashboard project (ICDex grid bot) with canister-based backend. Bot is running but open orders are not appearing. Debugging by adding detailed logging to the trading loop.
architectural_notes: Backend is an ICP canister interacting with ICDex for grid trading
Bot loop runs every 10s with configurable spread and order count
Open orders panel queries canister pending/pendingAll methods
known_issues: Bot starts successfully but no orders appear in Open Orders panel and no error logs are generated after bot start

new_feature_requests.summary: Add detailed step-by-step logging in tradingLoop() to reveal where the bot is failing (price fetch, order creation, errors)

In the backend tradingLoop() function, add detailed activity log entries at every key step: (1) before fetching the current market price, (2) after successfully fetching the price, (3) before placing each individual buy/sell order, (4) after each order placement attempt (logging success with order ID or failure with error message), (5) when catching any exception or error during the loop. Each log entry must include a descriptive message so the frontend Activity Log panel can display exactly where the loop is succeeding or failing.
